center.name: Loitokitok
center.summary: Loitokitok是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括红腰梅花雀，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-cheeked waxbill or red-rumped waxbill (Brunhilda charmosyna) is a common species of estrildid finch found in east Africa

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The black-cheeked waxbill or red-rumped waxbill (Brunhilda charmosyna) is a common species of estrildid finch found in east Africa
